name: Old Fashioned Penuche Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine brown sugar and water in a 2-quart microwave-safe bowl.
2. Microwave for 3 to 3 1/2 minutes at HIGH or until boiling.
3. Stir in condensed milk.
4. Microwave for 8 to 10 minutes at MED-HIGH (70%), or until the mixture forms a soft ball (240°F on a candy thermometer) when a small amount is dropped into cold water.
5. Stir in chopped nuts.
6. Beat until thick and creamy.
7. Pour into an 8-inch square buttered pan.
8. Cool.
9. Cut into squares.
